key_changes.reason: Applying 'transform' to an ancestor (body) creates a new containing block, breaking 'position: fixed' for the Chatbot on the homepage.

key_changes.change: Removed 'initWhatsAppFloat' function and all initialization calls.
key_changes.reason: WhatsApp contact is now integrated into the Chatbot; redundant floating button was removed to prevent UI overlap.

key_changes.change: Injected Chatbot HTML, CSS, and JS into 41 subpages.
key_changes.reason: Consistency across the site; ensures the AI assistant is available on all marketing and info pages.
Final safety measure to suppress the old WhatsApp widget if any legacy code or cached CSS attempts to render it.

handover_notes: The Chatbot is now the primary conversion tool. If adding new pages, use the pattern found in 'contact-us.html' or 'index.html' for the chatbot block. Do not re-enable 'transform' on the body element without testing 'position: fixed' elements.

summary: Site-wide synchronization of Chatbot UI and total removal of legacy WhatsApp float.
details: 47 files modified and pushed to main. Fixed 'position: fixed' failure on homepage by removing body transform. Injected chatbot block into all 41 missing HTML pages via PowerShell automation. Verified global suppression of WhatsApp float container.
